headline: Trump 🍊👑 inks Iran Deal 📜 before Friday 🔥
text:
JD Vance 🧔💼 spills the TEA ☕ that the US-Iran MOU 📄 is barely a PAGE AND A HALF 📑 and super GENERAL 🌀 – details later! Donald 🍊🤡 says the deal is SIGNED ✍️ electronically by him, Vance 🧔 and Iran’s Speaker Ghalibaf 🗣️🇮🇷 – big flex on the G7 🏛️ summit in France 🇫🇷! Trump told Macron 🥐👨‍🦳 “it’s signed, baby!” 🤩📜 – now the Strait of Hormuz 🌊🚢 re-opens Friday, ships loaded with OIL 🛢️🍯 already flowing like crypto pumps! 🤑💨

Nuclear inspectors 🔍☢️ back in like TSA at the airport ✈️ – IAEA + US gonna help Iran torch that highly enriched stockpile 🔥💥, verifiable no-nuke promise! 🛡️😤 Iran commits to “regional peace and stability” ☮️🕊️ – no more funding TERROR GROUPS 🧨💣! Ceasefire extended 60 DAYS ⏰ – Lebanon covered but Israel keeps security zones 🛡️🗺️, right to self-defense retained! Netanyahu 🕍🗡️ says “as long as necessary” – Hezbollah 🚀 returns fire after first strike, four gone 💀😢!

Pakistan’s PM Sharif 🇵🇰🤝 brokered the handshake, Qatar 🇶🇦 did 14-15 HOURS of marathon talks 🏃‍♂️💬! Iran’s top brass 🪖 claims “US & Israel had no choice but surrender” 🏳️🤡 – yet Tehran admits “deep mistrust” 😒🧊 of Uncle Sam 🇺🇸! Sanctions relief 💰🔓 and frozen oil billions 🛢️💵 only if Iran meets commitments – technical talks on nukes kick off THIS WEEK 📅🔬!

G7 allies Egypt 🇪🇬 Qatar 🇶🇦 UAE 🇦🇪 joining the Iran session – UK/France wanted ships in Hormuz 🚢🛡️ but Trump says “maybe a ship or two” 🛳️🍹, not much help needed! Araghchi 🇮🇷 warns any Israeli attack now = deal VIOLATION 🚫⚖️, “US & Israel vs Iran & Hezbollah” sides drawn! 😤⚔️ Ships moving, oil flowing, peace vibes loading… but details still cooking in Geneva 🇨🇭🍝! Vance says Trump might drop the full MOU before Friday – stay tuned for the next episode of Geopolitical Real Housewives! 📺🍿
